allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"✅ 变更创建成功!\\\\nID: {d['id']}\\\\n标题: {d['title']}\\\\n状态: {d['status']}\\\\n模块数: {len\(d.get\('modules', []\)\)}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"✅ 执行成功! 状态: {d['status']}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"审批状态: {d.get\('modules', [{}]\)[0].get\('status'\)}\\"\)")
Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="用户明确同意执行数据库重置" npx prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed)
Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="用户明确同意执行数据库重置" npx prisma migrate reset --force)
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT id, name, description FROM Module LIMIT 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 prisma/dev.db "SELECT m.name AS department, COUNT\(cid.id\) AS item_count FROM Module m LEFT JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.moduleId = m.id LEFT JOIN checklist_item_defs cid ON cid.templateId = ct.id WHERE m.name IN \('工艺部门', '设备部门', '质量部门'\) GROUP BY m.name;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/zhouao/Documents/GitHub/ChangeManagement/change-management/prisma/dev.db "SELECT m.name AS department, ct.name AS template_name FROM Module m LEFT JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.moduleId = m.id;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/zhouao/Documents/GitHub/ChangeManagement/change-management/prisma/dev.db "UPDATE checklist_templates SET name = '设备部门变更检查清单' WHERE moduleId = \(SELECT id FROM Module WHERE name = '设备部门'\); UPDATE checklist_templates SET name = '工艺部门变更检查清单' WHERE moduleId = \(SELECT id FROM Module WHERE name = '工艺部门'\); UPDATE checklist_templates SET name = '质量部门变更检查清单' WHERE moduleId = \(SELECT id FROM Module WHERE name = '质量部门'\); SELECT m.name AS department, ct.name AS template_name FROM Module m LEFT JOIN checklist_templates ct ON ct.moduleId = m.id;")
